runtime_hints.description: Non-binding hints about target runtime. Adapters ignore unknown fields.

reducer.description: replace: last-write-wins (default). append: concat arrays. merge: deep object merge. custom: fn_ref required.

reducer_fn_ref.description: npm package ref '@scope/pkg/fn' or local path './path/to/fn.ts'

items.description: Named agent persona. Referenced by agent_role nodes. CrewAI: Agent(). LG: synthesised sub-graph. MA: new Agent(). MS: ChatCompletionAgent.

structured_output.description: Force typed JSON response from LLM. LG: .with_structured_output(). MA: structuredOutput option. SK: typed return.

memory_access.description: isolated (default): agent memory is private; only the structured result written to output_field crosses into parent flow state. shared: agent reads/writes a named store also accessible to the parent flow, declared via memory_store_id. Harness validation error: async_execution + shared is disallowed — parallel agents must be isolated.

memory_store_id.description: Required when memory_access is "shared". Must reference a key in the flow's top-level memory_stores object.

tool_approval.description: auto (default): agent executes all tool calls without pausing. human: adapter synthesises an approval gate before each tool call, reusing the shared HITL checkpoint/resume mechanism (same as hitl_breakpoint). Manual wiring of the approval gate is not possible for runtime-determined tool calls — this is a justified exception to the composability-over-flags principle.

anyOf.description: Executes an agent persona from agents[]. CR: native Task+Agent. LG: synthesised ReAct sub-graph. MA: createStep(agent). MS: ChatCompletionAgent.

position.description: Canvas layout coordinates. Non-semantic — adapters MUST ignore this field.

fn_ref.description: npm package ref '@scope/pkg/fn' or local path './path/to/fn.ts'

termination_condition.description: Branch condition. expr: JSONPath (no-code). fn_ref: code panel.

anyOf.description: Multi-agent conversation loop. MS: native GroupChat/AgentGroupChat. LG/CR/MA: synthesised by adapter. Canvas shows warning for non-MS adapters.

context_from.description: Node IDs whose outputs are injected as context. CR: Task.context. LG: state.context. MA: step input.

anyOf.description: Fixed transition. SK/MS adapter: emitEvent/onEvent pair using edge id as event name.

fn_ref.description: npm package ref '@scope/pkg/fn' or local path './path/to/fn.ts'

condition.description: Branch condition. expr: JSONPath (no-code). fn_ref: code panel.

tool_ref.description: npm package ref '@scope/pkg/fn' or local path './path/to/fn.ts'

mcp_server_url.description: Required when source is "mcp". Must always reference an environment variable — never hardcoded in the spec. MA: native. LG: langchain-mcp-adapters. MS: custom KernelFunction wrapper. CR: BaseTool bridge adapter (RFC open).

namespace.description: Optional partition key for vector stores. One store entry per namespace. If the namespace value contains sensitive routing information (e.g. a tenant ID), store it in an environment variable and reference the variable name here — never hardcode the value.

mode.description: updates: all runtimes. tokens: all runtimes. debug: LG only.

process_type.description: CrewAI: Crew(process=). Other adapters ignore. hierarchical requires manager_agent_ref.

manager_agent_ref.description: agents[] entry ID for hierarchical process manager. CrewAI only; required when process_type is hierarchical.

a2a_config.description: A2A deployment config. Adapter generates AgentCard at /.well-known/agent.json and /tasks/send endpoint. hitl_breakpoint maps to A2A "input-required" state.

process_concept_id.description: ID of the process concept that seeds the task graph for this run. Must reference a registered concept. When absent the model performs its own decomposition.

harness_meta.description: Marks a flow as harness-capable. When enabled is false (default), the adapter rejects harness node types. Set enabled: true only on flows that have been migrated and use harness nodes.

FlowSpec.description: Its Harness flow spec v1.0.0 — runtime-agnostic workflow spec for LangGraph, CrewAI, Mastra, and MS Agent Framework adapters.
